title: centaurea lyratifolia
intro: Centaurea lyratifolia, also known as the Lyre-leaf Centaury, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its distinctive lyre-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds that can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits associated with Centaurea lyratifolia include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Centaurea lyratifolia is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a component in herbal remedies and supplements, although its effectiveness and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before consumption.
